case_title: HUGO ALBERTO GOMEZ VS. JOSE MIRANDA PICASSO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, HUGO ALBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PICASSO, JOSE MIRANDA ,AN INDIVIDUAL $8,093.80 PRINCIPAL, $50.47 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,344.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
